metadata.description: Batch 27 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 2601-2700; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: a set of connected parts working together
words.example: The inspection system records every defect.

words.definitionEn: a flat piece of furniture or an arrangement of data
words.definitionTh: โต๊ะ / ตาราง
words.example: The results are shown in the table.

words.definitionEn: a small portable computer or a compressed medicine
words.definitionTh: แท็บเล็ต / แผ่นยา
words.example: The operator entered data on a tablet.

words.definitionEn: the back part of an animal’s body
to carry, use, accept, or require time
words.definitionTh: เอา / ใช้เวลา

words.definitionEn: a story, especially one that may be imaginary
words.definitionTh: เรื่องเล่า
words.example: The book tells an old tale.

words.definitionEn: a natural ability to do something well
words.example: She has a talent for engineering.

words.definitionEn: to speak with someone; a conversation
words.example: We need to talk about the result.

words.definitionEn: having greater than average height
words.example: The tank is three metres tall.

words.definitionEn: a large container for liquid or gas
words.example: Check the temperature inside the tank.

words.definitionEn: a narrow strip used for joining or recording
a goal or level that someone aims to reach
a piece of work that must be completed
the flavour of food; to experience flavour
words.definitionTh: รสชาติ / ชิม
words.example: The product has a sweet taste.

words.definitionEn: money collected by a government
a car that carries passengers for payment
words.example: We took a taxi to the factory.

words.definitionEn: a drink made by adding hot water to leaves
words.example: She drinks tea in the morning.

words.definitionEn: to help someone learn
words.example: The trainer will teach the new procedure.

words.definitionEn: a person who teaches
the activity or profession of helping people learn
a group of people working or playing together
words.example: The project team reviewed the data.

words.definitionEn: to pull apart; a drop of liquid from the eye
words.definitionTh: ฉีก / น้ำตา

words.definitionEn: relating to practical skills, machines, or science
a particular method of doing something
scientific knowledge used for practical purposes
relating to people aged thirteen to nineteen
a person aged from thirteen to nineteen
a device used to speak to someone at a distance
words.example: The telephone rang during the meeting.

words.definitionEn: a system or device for showing moving images
words.example: The news was shown on television.

words.definitionEn: to give information to someone
words.example: Tell the supervisor about the fault.

words.definitionEn: the measured degree of heat
lasting for only a limited time
the number 10
to usually behave in a particular way
words.example: Defects tend to occur at start-up.

words.definitionEn: a game played with rackets and a ball
a portable shelter made of fabric
words.example: The team slept in a tent.

words.definitionEn: a word, period, or condition in an agreement
words.definitionTh: คำศัพท์ / ระยะเวลา

words.definitionEn: extremely bad or unpleasant
words.example: The machine made a terrible noise.

words.definitionEn: to examine performance or quality; an examination
words.definitionTh: ทดสอบ / การทดสอบ

words.definitionEn: written words, especially in a message or document
words.example: Enter the text in the field.

words.definitionEn: used to compare two things
words.example: This camera is faster than the old one.

words.definitionEn: to express appreciation
words.example: Thank the team for its support.

words.definitionEn: used to identify a person or thing or connect clauses
used before a specific noun
words.definitionTh: คำนำหน้านาม

words.definitionEn: a building where plays or performances are presented
words.example: The play was performed in a theatre.

words.definitionEn: belonging to them
the one or ones belonging to them
used to refer to people as the object
the main subject or idea
words.definitionTh: หัวข้อหลัก

words.definitionEn: used when people are both subject and object
words.definitionTh: ตัวพวกเขาเอง

words.definitionEn: at that time or next
words.example: Check the sensor, then restart the line.

words.definitionEn: a set of ideas explaining something
treatment intended to improve health
in or at that place
for that reason
words.example: The risk is high; therefore, action is required.

words.definitionEn: used to refer to people previously mentioned
having a large distance between opposite surfaces
a person who steals
having little distance between opposite surfaces
words.example: Apply a thin layer of oil.

words.definitionEn: an object, idea, event, or situation
words.example: The first thing is to stop the machine.

words.definitionEn: to use the mind to form ideas or opinions
the process of using the mind to consider something
number three in order
words.example: This is the third inspection point.

words.definitionEn: needing or wanting a drink
words.example: The operator was thirsty after the shift.

words.definitionEn: the number 13
the number 30
used to refer to a nearby thing or present situation
despite the fact that
words.example: The test passed, though the margin was small.

words.definitionEn: an idea or the act of thinking
words.example: The engineer shared a useful thought.

words.definitionEn: the number 1,000
words.example: The line produces one thousand units.

words.definitionEn: a statement or situation that may cause harm
words.example: The loose part is a safety threat.

words.definitionEn: to say or show that you may harm someone
words.example: Excess heat can threaten product quality.

words.definitionEn: the number 3
the passage inside the neck used for breathing and swallowing
from one side or end to the other
words.example: The product moves through the tunnel.

words.definitionEn: in every part of a place or period
words.definitionTh: ตลอดทั่วทั้ง

words.definitionEn: to send something through the air with the hand
words.example: Do not throw waste on the floor.

words.definitionEn: the day after Wednesday
words.definitionTh: วันพฤหัสบดี
words.example: The audit is scheduled for Thursday.

words.definitionEn: as a result or in this way

arranged neatly and in order

words.definitionEn: to fasten with a knot; a narrow piece of clothing
words.definitionTh: ผูก / เนกไท

words.definitionEn: fixed firmly or fitting closely
words.example: Make sure the connection is tight.

words.definitionEn: until a particular time
what is measured in seconds, minutes, hours, days, and years
a soft silver metal or a metal container
words.definitionTh: ดีบุก / กระป๋อง

words.definitionEn: extremely small
words.example: The camera detected a tiny crack.

words.definitionEn: the pointed end or a useful piece of advice
words.definitionTh: ปลาย / เคล็ดลับ

words.definitionEn: needing rest or sleep
the name of a book, document, job, or work

words.definitionEn: used to show direction, purpose, or an infinitive
words.example: Move the camera to the left.

words.definitionEn: the present day
one of the five end parts of the foot
words.example: The box fell near his toe.

words.definitionEn: with each other or in one group
a fixture or room used for removing body waste
words.example: The toilet is near the entrance.

words.definitionEn: a soft red fruit used as food
words.example: Add one tomato to the salad.

words.definitionEn: the day after today
the quality of a voice or sound
words.example: Use a professional tone in the email.

words.definitionEn: the part of the mouth used for taste and speech
during the present night
